cookieConsent.title: 🍪 Cookie Settings
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and personalize content.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for basic website functionality and cannot be disabled.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: Remember your preferences to provide better personalized experience.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with the website, collect and report information.

about.title: About
about.intro: I'm an independent developer passionate about technology and design. This project aims to provide content creators with a simple and efficient graphic creation tool, helping them quickly create image content suitable for various social platforms.
about.mission: To enable everyone to easily create professional-grade social media images without complex design software, producing high-quality content quickly.
about.feature1Desc: Supports various social media platform sizes including Douyin, Xiaohongshu, WeChat Official Accounts and more
about.feature2Desc: Carefully selected 20+ popular fonts to make your content stand out
about.feature3Desc: Customizable text or image watermarks to protect your work
about.feature4Desc: One-click export of high-definition watermark-free images for easy sharing

faq.title: FAQ
faq.intro: Here are answers to some common questions about Graphic Creator. If you can't find what you need, feel free to contact us via email.
faq.a1: Yes, Graphic Creator is completely free to use. You can create, edit, and export images at no cost.
faq.a2: No, exported images are watermark-free by default. You can add watermarks if needed.
faq.a3: We support common sizes for various social media platforms, including Douyin, Xiaohongshu, WeChat Official Accounts, Channels, and more. Custom sizes are also supported.
faq.q4: Can I upload my own background images?
faq.a4: Yes, you can upload local images as background. We support common formats like JPG, PNG, and GIF.
faq.q5: What fonts can I choose from?
faq.a5: We've carefully selected over 20 popular fonts, covering Chinese fonts, artistic fonts, handwriting fonts and more styles to meet different needs.
faq.a6: In the "Watermark Settings" on the left side of the editor, you can enable the watermark feature, choose text or image watermarks, and customize parameters like position, color, and opacity.
faq.q7: What's the resolution of exported images?
faq.a7: We provide HD and standard quality export options. HD export maintains the original size clarity, suitable for formal use; standard export has smaller file size, suitable for quick previews.
faq.a8: No. All image editing is done locally in your browser. We don't upload or save any of your images. Your editing content will not be retained after you close the browser.
faq.contactText: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to contact us via email and we'll respond as soon as possible.

section1.title: Introduction
section1.p1: We take your privacy very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information.
section1.p2: This tool is a pure frontend application. All operations are performed locally in your browser. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of your personal information.

section2.title: Information Collection
section2.p1: We **do not collect any user personal information**. All content you create (including text, images, etc.) is stored only in your local browser.
section2.li1: Local processing: Text you enter and images you select are processed temporarily in your browser memory and cleared when you close the browser
section2.li2: No server transmission: Content you create is never uploaded to our servers or any third-party services
section2.li3: Cookies: Only used to remember your language preference, contains no personally identifiable information
section2.li4: No analytics tracking: We do not use any analytics tools or tracking codes

section3.title: Use of Information
section3.p1: Since we do not collect any user information, there is no use of information.

section4.title: Information Sharing
section4.p1: We **do not share your information with any third parties** because we do not collect any information at all.

section5.title: Data Security
section5.p1: Since all data is processed in your local browser, you have complete control over your data. We recommend regularly clearing your browser cache and cookies.

section6.title: Your Rights
section6.p1: Under applicable law, you have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, delete your data, object to or restrict processing, data portability. You can exercise these rights by contacting us.

section7.title: Children's Privacy
section7.p1: Our service is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

section8.title: Policy Changes
section8.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page and the "Last updated" date will be updated accordingly. Significant changes will be notified to you in advance.

section1.title: Acceptance of Terms
section1.p1: Welcome to use the Social Media Graphic Creator. By accessing or using our service, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service.
section1.p2: If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

section2.title: Service Description
section2.p1: Our tool provides the following features:
section2.li1: Multiple social media platform size options

section3.title: Usage Guidelines
section3.li1: Comply with applicable laws and regulations
section3.li2: Not create or distribute illegal, harmful, fraudulent, or infringing content
section3.li3: Not attempt to hack, reverse engineer, or interfere with our service
section3.li4: Not abuse or excessively use our service
section3.p2: You commit not to use this tool to create the following content:
section3.p3: Content that violates laws and regulations; materials that infringe intellectual property; pornographic, violent, or hate speech; fraudulent or deceptive information; other harmful content.
section3.li2: Respect intellectual property rights, only use images and fonts you have the right to use
section3.li3: Be responsible for the security of your account and password

section4.title: Intellectual Property
section4.li1: Content you create is owned by you
section4.li2: Our tool and interface design are protected by intellectual property rights
section4.li3: You must ensure that materials you use (images, fonts) have proper authorization
section4.li4: We are not responsible for the legality of third-party materials

section5.title: Disclaimer
section5.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:
section5.li1: Service is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties
section5.li2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted, error-free, or virus-free service
section5.li3: We are not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of the service

section6.title: Service Changes
section6.p1: We reserve the right to modify or terminate the service at any time without prior notice.
section6.p2: We may perform regular maintenance on the service, during which the service may be temporarily unavailable.

section7.title: Termination of Use
section7.p1: Under the following circumstances, we may terminate your access:
section7.li1: Violation of these Terms of Service

section8.title: Dispute Resolution
section8.p1: Any disputes arising from the use of this service shall be resolved through friendly negotiation. If negotiation fails, the laws of the People's Republic of China shall apply.

section9.title: Contact Us
section9.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at gueson1989@163.com.

section1.title: What are Cookies
section1.p1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website.
section1.p2: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your user experience, remember your preferences, and analyze website traffic.

section2.title: Types of Cookies We Use
section2.p1: We use the following types of cookies:
section2.li1: Essential cookies: Cookies necessary to ensure the website functions properly
section2.li2: Functional cookies: To remember your preferences (such as language, theme selection)
section2.li3: Analytics cookies: To help us understand how visitors interact with the website

section3.title: Cookie Details
section3.p1: Below is a list of specific cookies we use on our website:

section4.title: How to Manage Cookies
section4.p1: You can manage cookie settings through:
section4.li1: Browser settings: Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies
section4.li2: Browser extensions: Use privacy protection plugins
section4.li3: Cookie consent settings on this website

section5.title: Third-party Cookies
section5.p1: Our website may include cookies from third-party services, such as:
section5.p2: Google Analytics (website analytics), social media share buttons, etc. These cookies are set by respective third parties and are governed by their privacy policies.

section6.title: GDPR Compliance
section6.p1: For EU users, we are committed to complying with GDPR regulations. We will obtain your explicit consent before collecting non-essential cookies. You have the right to withdraw consent and manage your cookie preferences at any time.

section7.title: Policy Updates
section7.p1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.
